name: Q-12 log path honors $Q12_LOG_PATH env override for hermetic testing per the §26 substrate contract
command: Q12_LOG_PATH=custom.jsonl bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id review --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 2>err.txt && [ -s custom.jsonl ] && echo override 1>&2
